neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion

Package
Description
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion used by neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion
    Class
    Description
    CorrosionInhibitorPerformance
    Empirical performance model for film-forming corrosion inhibitors.
    CorrosionInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry
    Corrosion inhibitor chemistry family.
    LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm
    Langmuir adsorption isotherm for film-forming corrosion inhibitors.
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    Mechanistic CO2 corrosion model that combines a kinetic NORSOK M-506 baseline with Nesic-style mass-transfer limitation and a Langmuir adsorption inhibitor isotherm.
